lore.english:
Taimanin, Gosha Academy student. She works hard every day as a class representative. A little clumsy, but always puts a bright smile on her face.

Possesses unbelievably powerful physical strength, even among Taimanins. Despite her status as a student, she often goes out on missions. Despite her outstanding physical abilities, it's always her clumsiness that keeps her from being perfect.

Earth Art ninja. She fights in a style applying Earth Art to her own fists. Furthermore, her exclusive weapon is a prototype scroll bullet, which enables her to use abilities other than Earth Art.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Power Fist: Chain Explosion[-]
skills.description:
Strikes an enemy 2 times with a powerful punch, then shoots flame bullets for the finishing move.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Stun] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:510102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:510102] turn(s)
[&Common_Word_Skill_ATKDEF]

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Scroll Bullet: Cold Heat Blast[-]
skills.description:
Loads the gauntlet with Ninja Art bullets and fires 4 shots at the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:510202]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:510202]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:510202] turn(s)
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:510203]%)[-] [&Freeze] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:510203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:510203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Earth Art: Stone Spear[-]
skills.description:
Performs a [&Common_Word_Skill_StrongDamage] on the ground and attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll].
If the target has 3 or more [&DeBuff]s, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:510302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
